title: Conciliation as means of resolving legal conflict
author: Khudoikina T.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The article is devoted to the analysis of conciliation procedures as the most effective way to resolve the legal conflict. Positive aspects of peaceful procedures and reasons for their non-use by citizens are revealed. The urgency of the sphere of mediation in the Republic of Mordovia is considered. The problems and prospects of development of this legal phenomenon are highlighted.
steps_raw: The article is devoted to the analysis of conciliation procedures as the most effective way to resolve the legal conflict.
